document.hierarchy_note: Single bilateral term loan facility agreement, not a multi-facility deal document and not an individual utilisation/loan instrument.

source_refs.quote: EXECUTION VERSION
6 December 2022
DIGNITY PLC (the "Company") and as borrower (the " Borrower")
PHOENIX UK FUND LTD. as lender (the " Lender")

facility.purpose: Provision of equity support to the Borrower's whole business securitisation through share subscription and/or subordinated debt.
purpose_restrictions: The Lender is not bound to monitor or verify the application of any amount borrowed pursuant to the Agreement.

source_refs.quote: "Commitment" means £50,000,000

source_refs.title: The Facility
source_refs.quote: a sterling term loan facility in an amount equal to the Commitment

source_refs.title: Purpose
source_refs.quote: towards the provision of equity support to its whole business securitisation

legal.jurisdiction_clause: The courts of England have exclusive jurisdiction to settle disputes arising out of or in connection with the Agreement.

source_refs.title: Governing law
source_refs.quote: are governed by English law

source_refs.title: Jurisdiction
source_refs.quote: The courts of England have exclusive jurisdiction

source_refs.title: Third party rights
source_refs.quote: has no right under the Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Act 1999

capitalisation.compounding_method: Interest is automatically capitalised on the last day of the first Interest Period and on the last day of each subsequent Interest Period.

source_refs.quote: “Interest Rate” means seven per cent..

source_refs.title: Calculation of interest
source_refs.quote: is the equal to the Interest Rate

source_refs.title: Capitalisation of payment of interest
source_refs.quote: Interest shall be automatically capitalised

source_refs.title: Day count convention
source_refs.quote: calculated on the basis of the actual number of days elapsed and a year of 360 days

availability_and_utilisation.availability_basis: From and including the date of the Agreement to and including the date which is 12 Months after the date of the Agreement.

source_refs.quote: to and including the date which is 12 Months after the date of this Agreement

source_refs.title: Maximum number of Loans
source_refs.quote: more than five Loans would be outstanding

source_refs.title: Delivery of a Utilisation Request
source_refs.quote: not later than 10:00 a.m. seven days before the First Utilisation Date

source_refs.title: Delivery of a Utilisation Request
source_refs.quote: not later than 10:00 a.m. thirty days before the Utilisation Date

source_refs.title: Currency and amount
source_refs.quote: a minimum of £10,000,000 or, if less, the Available Commitment
the date which is three years after the date of the first Utilisation Request

source_refs.title: Repayment of Loans
source_refs.quote: The Borrower shall repay each Loan on the Termination Date

source_refs.title: Mandatory prepayment at the request of the Lender
source_refs.quote: giving not less than 180 days’ prior notice in writing

payments_and_settlement.business_day_definition: A day other than Saturday or Sunday on which banks are open for general business in London.
payments_and_settlement.set_off_terms: Borrower payments must be made without set-off or counterclaim; the Lender may set off matured obligations owed by the Borrower against matured obligations owed by the Lender to the Borrower.
payments_and_settlement.payment_disruption_or_funding_indemnity: The Agreement contains Disruption Event payment-system provisions and indemnity for specified costs, losses or liabilities from Events of Default, non-payment, failed funding arrangements or failure to prepay after notice.

source_refs.quote: banks are open for general business in London

source_refs.title: Currency of account
source_refs.quote: the Base Currency is the currency of account and payment

source_refs.title: Business Days
source_refs.quote: shall be made on the next Business Day in the same calendar month

source_refs.title: Set-off
source_refs.quote: The Lender may set off any matured obligation due from the Borrower

source_refs.title: Pari passu ranking
source_refs.quote: rank at least pari passu with the claims of all its other unsecured and unsubordinated creditors

source_refs.title: Negative pledge
source_refs.quote: The Borrower shall not create or permit to subsist any Security over any of its assets

items.qualifier: Must be in form and substance satisfactory to the Lender before a Utilisation Request may be delivered.

source_refs.title: Borrower
source_refs.quote: A copy of the constitutional documents of the Borrower

items.description: Board resolution approving the Agreement and transactions, authorising execution, and authorising signing/despatch of documents and notices.
items.qualifier: Must be in form and substance satisfactory to the Lender before a Utilisation Request may be delivered.

source_refs.title: Borrower
source_refs.quote: approving the terms of, and the transactions contemplated by, this Agreement

items.description: Specimen signature of each authorised person.
items.qualifier: Must be in form and substance satisfactory to the Lender before a Utilisation Request may be delivered.

source_refs.title: Borrower
source_refs.quote: A specimen of the signature of each person authorised

items.description: Director certificate that borrowing or guaranteeing the Commitment would not exceed any borrowing, guaranteeing or similar limit binding on the Borrower.
items.qualifier: Must be in form and substance satisfactory to the Lender before a Utilisation Request may be delivered.

source_refs.title: Borrower
source_refs.quote: would not cause any borrowing, guaranteeing or similar limit binding on the Borrower to be exceeded

items.description: Authorised signatory certificate that each copy document specified in Schedule 1 is correct, complete and in full force and effect as at a date no earlier than the date of the Agreement.
items.qualifier: Must be in form and substance satisfactory to the Lender before a Utilisation Request may be delivered.

source_refs.title: Borrower
source_refs.quote: is correct, complete and in full force and effect

items.description: Due authorisation and enforceability legal opinion of Linklaters LLP in customary form, as legal advisers to the Borrower in England.
items.qualifier: Must be in form and substance satisfactory to the Lender before a Utilisation Request may be delivered.

source_refs.title: Legal opinions
source_refs.quote: A due authorisation and enforceability legal opinion of Linklaters LLP

source_refs.title: Initial conditions precedent
source_refs.quote: in form and substance satisfactory to the Lender

source_refs.title: Further conditions precedent
source_refs.quote: no Default is continuing or would result from the proposed Loan

representations.materiality_qualifier: Certain representations include materiality or Material Adverse Effect qualifiers; Repeating Representations are made on each Utilisation Request date and first day of each Interest Period.

items.description: Status, binding obligations, non-conflict, power and authority, validity and admissibility, governing law and enforcement, no filing or stamp taxes, insolvency, no default, no misleading information, pari passu ranking, no proceedings, and no breach of laws.

source_refs.title: Representations
source_refs.quote: The Borrower makes the representations and warranties set out in this Clause 11

source_refs.title: Repetition
source_refs.quote: on the date of each Utilisation Request and the first day of each Interest Period

information_undertakings: Supply documents dispatched by the Borrower or any Group member to creditors generally or any class of them.

Promptly supply details of litigation, arbitration or administrative proceedings current, threatened or pending against any Group member which, if adversely determined, are reasonably likely to have a Material Adverse Effect.
Promptly supply details of judgments or orders against any Group member which are reasonably likely to have a Material Adverse Effect.
Promptly on request, provide further information regarding the financial condition, assets and operations of the Group as the Lender may reasonably request.
Notify the Lender of any Default and remedial steps promptly upon becoming aware of its occurrence; provide no-Default certificate on request.
general_undertakings: Maintain required Authorisations for performance, legality, validity, enforceability and admissibility of the Agreement.
Comply in all respects with applicable laws where failure would materially impair ability to perform obligations under the Agreement.
No material change in the general nature of the business of the Borrower or Group taken as a whole from that carried on at the date of the Agreement.
Subject to express exclusions in the Change of Control definition, the Borrower must remain the ultimate holding company of the Group.
Negative pledge restricts Security and certain quasi-security arrangements subject to listed carve-outs.

Save for Financial Indebtedness between the Borrower and Group members, the Borrower must not incur or allow to remain outstanding Financial Indebtedness not existing at the date of the Agreement without prior Lender approval, not to be unreasonably withheld.
covenants_and_undertakings.debt_restrictions: Borrower may not incur or allow to remain outstanding new Financial Indebtedness, except Financial Indebtedness between it and members of the Group, without prior approval of the Lender not to be unreasonably withheld.

source_refs.title: Information: miscellaneous
source_refs.quote: such further information regarding the financial condition, assets and operations of the Group

source_refs.title: Change of business
source_refs.quote: no material change is made to the general nature of the business

source_refs.title: Financial indebtedness
source_refs.quote: without the prior approval of the Lender (not to be unreasonably withheld)

events.description: Non-payment of amounts due under the Agreement, subject to administrative or technical error or Disruption Event carve-out and payment within 15 Business Days.
events.heading: Non-payment

source_refs.title: Non-payment
source_refs.quote: payment is made within 15 Business Days of its due date

events.description: Failure to comply with provisions of the Agreement other than non-payment, if capable of remedy and not remedied within 10 Business Days of notice or awareness.
events.heading: Other obligations

source_refs.title: Other obligations
source_refs.quote: is remedied within 10 Business Days

events.description: Representation or statement made or deemed made by the Borrower in the Agreement or related delivered document is or proves incorrect or misleading in any material respect, with a stated 20 Business Day remedy period for capable matters.
events.heading: Misrepresentation

source_refs.title: Misrepresentation
source_refs.quote: incorrect or misleading in any material respect

events.description: Cross default/cross acceleration/cancelled or suspended commitments for Group Financial Indebtedness, subject to aggregate £5,000,000 threshold.
events.heading: Cross default

source_refs.title: Cross default
source_refs.quote: is less than £5,000,000

events.description: Insolvency, inability to pay debts, suspension of payments, financial-difficulty rescheduling negotiations, balance-sheet insolvency of the Borrower, or moratorium of Borrower indebtedness.
events.heading: Insolvency

events.description: Insolvency proceedings or analogous steps, excluding frivolous or vexatious winding-up petitions discharged, stayed or dismissed within 30 days.
events.heading: Insolvency proceedings

events.description: Creditors' process affecting Borrower assets not discharged within five Business Days.
events.heading: Creditors' process

events.description: It is or becomes unlawful for the Borrower to perform obligations under the Agreement.
events.heading: Unlawfulness

events.description: Any event or circumstance which in the reasonable opinion of the Lender constitutes a Material Adverse Effect.
events.heading: Material adverse change

events.description: Borrower repudiates the Agreement or evidences an intention to repudiate it.
events.heading: Repudiation

events_of_default.acceleration_and_enforcement_rights: On and at any time after a continuing Event of Default, the Lender may cancel the Available Commitment, declare all or part of the Loans and accrued/outstanding amounts immediately due and payable, and/or declare all or part of the Loans payable on demand.

source_refs.title: Events of Default
source_refs.quote: Each of the events or circumstances set out in Clause 14 is an Event of Default

source_refs.title: Acceleration
source_refs.quote: declare that all or part of the Loans, together with accrued interest

mandatory_prepayment_triggers.description: On a Change of Control, the Lender may on not less than 10 days' notice cancel the Available Commitment and declare all Loans and other accrued/outstanding amounts immediately due and payable.
At the Lender's request, giving not less than 180 days' prior written notice, the Borrower must prepay the whole or any part of any Loan.

cancellation_events.description: Change of Control permits cancellation of Available Commitment and cessation of further utilisation.

prepayment_and_cancellation.change_of_control: Change of Control includes a person or persons acting in concert, other than a holding company with substantially similar shareholders to the pre-existing shareholders of the Borrower, becoming interested in more than 50% of issued/allotted ordinary share capital or voting rights of the Borrower.

source_refs.title: Voluntary cancellation
source_refs.quote: not less than five Business Days' prior notice

source_refs.title: Voluntary prepayment of Loans
source_refs.quote: prepay the whole or any part of any Loan

source_refs.title: Restrictions
source_refs.quote: without premium or penalty

transfers_and_assignments.transfers_clause_ref: Clause 15 (Changes to the Lender); Clause 16 (Changes to the Borrower)
borrower_consent_exceptions: Borrower consent is not required for an assignment or transfer made at a time when an Event of Default is continuing.
permitted_transferees: a trust, fund or other entity which is regularly engaged in or established for the purpose of making, purchasing or investing in loans, securities or other financial assets
transfers_and_assignments.disclosure_to_potential_transferees: Confidential Information may be disclosed to potential assignees/transferees and related persons subject to the confidentiality conditions in Clause 26.2.

source_refs.title: Assignments and transfers by the Lender
source_refs.quote: assign any of its rights

source_refs.title: Borrower consent
source_refs.quote: The consent of the Borrower (not to be unreasonably withheld) is required

source_refs.title: Changes to the Borrower
source_refs.quote: The Borrower may not assign any of its rights or transfer any of its rights or obligations

deemed_delivery_rules: Fax communications by the Lender are effective when received in legible form.
Letters by the Lender are effective when left at the relevant address or five Business Days after being deposited in the post postage prepaid in an addressed envelope.
Communications to the Lender are effective only when actually received and marked for the attention of the identified department or officer.
Communications becoming effective after 5.00 p.m. in the place of receipt are deemed effective on the following day.
notice_mechanics.change_of_details_mechanics: A Party may notify substitute address, fax number, department or officer by not less than five Business Days' notice.

source_refs.title: Communications in writing
source_refs.quote: may be made by fax or letter

source_refs.title: Electronic communication
source_refs.quote: may be made or delivered by electronic mail or other electronic means

source_refs.title: English language
source_refs.quote: Any notice given under or in connection with this Agreement must be in English

fees.description: Borrower must promptly on demand pay the Lender all costs and expenses, including legal fees, reasonably incurred in connection with negotiation, preparation, printing and execution of the Agreement and other referred documents.
Borrower must reimburse amendment, waiver or consent request costs within three Business Days of demand.
Borrower must pay enforcement or preservation costs and expenses within three Business Days of demand.

fees_and_expenses.lender_preparation_costs: Transaction expenses, amendment costs and enforcement costs are payable by the Borrower to the Lender as specified in Clause 10.

source_refs.title: Transaction expenses
source_refs.quote: reasonably incurred by it in connection with the negotiation, preparation, printing and execution

source_refs.title: Enforcement costs
source_refs.quote: in connection with the enforcement of, or the preservation of any rights

tax_and_withholding.withholding_tax_provisions: Tax is defined, but the extracted facility text does not include a standalone tax gross-up clause; payments mechanics require Borrower payments without set-off or counterclaim.

source_refs.quote: "Tax" means any tax, levy, impost, duty or other charge or withholding

source_refs.title: No set-off by the Borrower
source_refs.quote: without (and free and clear of any deduction for) set-off or counterclaim

event_notice_requirements: Prompt notice to the Lender of any Default and steps being taken to remedy it upon the Borrower becoming aware.
Prompt details of material litigation, arbitration or administrative proceedings and material judgments/orders against Group members.
Prompt notice to the Lender upon the Company becoming aware of a Change of Control.

source_refs.title: Notification of default
source_refs.quote: promptly upon becoming aware of its occurrence

source_refs.title: Change of control
source_refs.quote: The Company shall promptly notify the Lender upon becoming aware of that event

operational_servicing_calendar.calendar_basis: London Business Days; periods are adjusted according to the Month and payment Business Day conventions in the Agreement.
operational_servicing_calendar.business_day_definition: A day, other than Saturday or Sunday, on which banks are open for general business in London.

events.description: Availability Period ends 12 Months after the date of the Agreement; unutilised Commitment is cancelled at the end of the Availability Period.
events.date_rule: 12 Months after the date of the Agreement

events.description: First Utilisation Date with utilisation not exceeding £15,000,000: Utilisation Request due by 10:00 a.m. seven days before the First Utilisation Date.
events.date_rule: 10:00 a.m. seven days before the First Utilisation Date

events.description: Following Utilisation Dates, or First Utilisation Date where amount exceeds £15,000,000: Utilisation Request due by 10:00 a.m. thirty days before the Utilisation Date.
events.date_rule: 10:00 a.m. thirty days before the Utilisation Date

events.description: Each Loan is repayable on the Termination Date.
events.date_rule: Three years after the date of the first Utilisation Request or such other date agreed by the Lender and Borrower in writing

operational_servicing_calendar.manual_review_reason: The Agreement date and first Utilisation Request date are blank/not specified in the extracted text, so exact calendar dates cannot be computed.

source_refs.quote: if the numerically corresponding day is not a Business Day

other_references.title: The Facility
other_references.quote: Subject to the terms of this Agreement

other_references.title: Interest
other_references.quote: The rate of interest on each Loan

extraction_notes: PDF text was extracted directly with extract_pdf_text and used as the source for this facility-level extraction.
The agreement date line is blank in the extracted text; document_date uses the visible 6 December 2022 footer/reference date rather than a completed agreement date.
No agent, arranger, guarantor or security trustee is identified in the extracted agreement.
known_omissions: Signature block addresses/fax/attention fields appear incomplete or blank in extracted page 37 and are not normalised except for named parties.
